function img_onerror(img) {
  $.ajax({
    url: img.dataset.wpsrc,
    type: 'HEAD',
    success: function () {
        //if success place alternate image url into image
        img.src = img.dataset.wpsrc;
    },
    error: function () {
        //if error place notfound image url into image
        img.src=img.dataset.notsrc;
    }
  });
  img.onerror = null;
}
